_note: Flat 4-step process: go to item shop → buy item → go to entity → defeat entity. pool values are lexicon paths (same convention as rule files). The generator translates them to elements keys via _pool_map. Which nodes are rule-governed is specified in the task spec's slot_bindings. execution_order controls the demo trace order: lower = earlier. Steps with the same value are parallel. Resolution is root-first (reverse list order), so forward 'from' references always point to already-resolved steps. Node properties (location, cost, attribute_names, etc.) are auto-populated from resolved argument records and task-level property_bindings — not declared here.
